info.title: Birdeye Data API via x402
info.description: Pay-per-request DeFi market data, token analytics, and wallet intelligence using the x402 payment protocol. Powered by Birdeye. Access real-time Solana metrics without API keys.

get.summary: Get token price at a specific Unix timestamp

parameters.name: unixtime
parameters.description: Unix timestamp in seconds for the historical price lookup. Omitting this falls back to the current price.

get.summary: Get historical price series for a token or pair

parameters.name: address_type
parameters.description: Whether the address is a token mint or a trading pair

parameters.name: time_from
parameters.description: Start of time range as Unix timestamp in seconds

parameters.name: time_to
parameters.description: End of time range as Unix timestamp in seconds

success.description: Indicates if the request was successful

data.description: Array of token data with price information for multiple timeframes

address.description: The address of the token contract.

multiplier.description: Multiplier used to scale the token price

unix_time_update_price.description: Unix timestamp of when the data was updated

price_change_percent.description: Percentage change in price over the specified timeframe

scaled_high.description: Highest scaled price during the timeframe

scaled_low.description: Lowest scaled price during the timeframe

get.summary: Search tokens and pairs by name, symbol, or address

parameters.name: keyword
parameters.description: Token name, symbol, or address to search for. Omitting returns a sorted list without filtering.
